summary: Web Client - 'Child' Keywords within a Cascading Dataset have no selectable values when the 'Parent' Keyword--which is a 'Child' of the Root value--is hidden.
description: [ Summary / Description ] In the Web Client, 'Child' keyword within a Cascading Data Set contains no values when its 'Parent' keyword--which is a 'Child' of the Root keyword--is configured as a 'Hidden' keyword. [ Business Impact ] Customer is forced to make a keyword they would prefer to have 'Hidden' visible for this process to work. They have had this process in place for some time, which works in 18, however now it is preventing an upgrade.[ Background ] Testing has confirmed that this issue does not occur in the Thick Client. [ Actual Behaviour vs. Desired Behaviour ] Actual behaviour: In the Web Client, 'Parent' keyword within a Cascading Dataset--which is a 'Child' of the Root keyword--must be set to visible for its 'Child' keyword to display selectable values in the Web Client. Desired behaviour: In the Web Client, 'Child' keyword within a Cascading Data Set will display selectable values regardless of whether its 'Parent' keyword---which is a 'Child' of the Root keyword--is configured as 'Hidden' or not. [ Latest Version/Build Tested ] 25.1[ Workarounds ] Do not configure the 'Parent' keyword--which is a 'Child' of the Root keyword--as a 'Hidden' keyword on the Document Type.

summary: Keyword panel is collapsing in both Unity and Web client upon executing "Set Property Value From Keyword Record"  ad hoc task for document having MIKG keyword set.
description: Keyword panel is collapsing in both Unity and Web client upon executing "Set Property Value From Keyword Record"  ad hoc task for document having MIKG keyword set.

summary: Data Validation - DateTime format provided from DataValidation JS is not working in Hungary
description:
For Hungarian locale, WorkView’s original dotted address value is getting returned from the database with  this format- 
"YYYY. MM. DD. H:mm:SS"
 , while actual format is being expected by DataValidation JS should be like-  
"YYYY. MM. DD.  HH:mm:SS"
. The second format has one extra white space between date and time part in data validation files which is causing client side JS validations for WV Data-Time attribute to fail in all scenarios.A typical full date and time format would look like this: 
"YYYY. MM. DD. HH:mm:SS"

summary: AFKS prompts twice to select data set when importing a document in WorkView
description:
Users are prompted twice to select a AFKS when Importing a Workview Object where the primary keyword is prepopulated and the WV Class utilizes a Doc Import Keyword Mapping   [ Module / Product Line Functionality ]WorkView/AutoFill Keyword Sets[ Summary / Description ]Users are prompted twice to select a AFKS when Importing a Workview Object where the primary keyword is prepopulated and the WV Class utilizes a Doc Import Keyword Mapping[ Business Impact ]Users can be confused on the existence of a second instance of an AFKS and it seems that the second one takes precedence if different values are selected.[ Actual Behavior vs. Desired Behavior ]ACTUAL: Users are prompted twice to select an AFKS when importing directly from a WV ObjectEXPECTED: Users should only be prompted once[ Customer Pain ]
 2 (Medium/Low)[ Defect Classification ]
 Usability[ Reported Version/Build ]
 24.1.1.1000[ Latest Version/Build Tested ]
 25.1.0.162[ Backport Request ]
 No

summary: Unity Client: Keyword panel error when document auto-open after import
description: When importing a document in Unity client, an error is thrown when attempting to open keyword panel from the document window that opens automatically after import( for this to happen check the Open Document after import option)

summary: In Unity Client duplicate keyword's fieldname's is  inconsistent over the builds
description: In UC application, in some of the builds (25.1.5.1000), Duplicate keyword’s fields names are coming with some junk character (Press f6 to ESC). (Here name is a control we use as an automation locator to locate the field in our WPF automation framework).Now the issue is, in some of the build the locator Name is coming as keyword field name as it is, in some builds (mentioned in the ticket), it is coming with some additional junk values.Now to locate this element, we need a generalize locator irrespective of the build, as automation script is failing particularly as it is not able to identify the element as the field value is getting changed.P.S: In web probably the property aria-label-description, is containing this same value which in not changing depends on build.

summary: Unable to update/delete an existing Floating Point Keyword in the Core when using an Oracle database and the number is rounded
description:
[ Module / Product Line Functionality ]  
Keywords - Core[ Summary / Description ]Attempting to update or delete a Floating Point Keyword that rounds up in the client will not be updated/deleted if done from the Core when using an Oracle database.For example:If the value in the Oracle database is 26.05999999, the Client will show it as 26.06, when attempting to delete/update this keyword, the database query in the Core will use 26.06 explicitly. In the Thick Client the query uses 26.06, but performs additional logic to handle the rounding.Core
:delete from hsi.keyitem598 where hsi.keyitem598.itemnum = 28395 and hsi.keyitem598.keyvaluefloat = 26.06Thick
:Delete from hsi.keyitem598 Where itemnum = 28395 and ABS(keyvaluefloat - 26.060000) < 0.000001[ Business Impact ]Users are unable to use the Unity Client to update Keywords. Workflow also does not work to update the Keywords either.[ Expected Behavior ]It is expected that the Core is able to delete/update all Keyword values regardless of their value[ Customer Pain ]
 3 (Medium)[ Defect Classification ]
 Usability[ Reported Version/Build ]
 24.1.7.1000[ Latest Version/Build Tested ]
 26.1.0.150[ Backport Request ]
 No[ Replicated ]
 Yes[ Location Replicated ]
 SQL-Interop_Current[ Configuration Items ]Unity or Web pointing to SQL Interop CurrentSQL Developer if you want to see the keyword value[ Steps to Recreate ]Log in to Unity as a member of the 'GRP - All Hyland Employees' groupRetrieve the document that is presentEnsure the Keyword value is something that will be rounded eg: 26.059999NOTE: You need to query the DB for this as in the Client it will be rounded and show as 26.06Attempt to delete/update the keywordSaveNote the document history shows the keyword is deleted but it appears back on the document[ Workarounds ]Use the Thick Client[ Potentially Related Cases Reviewed - Support Case, RFAs, TSKB, Jira ]None found specifically for this

summary: Doctype has with comment settings but  check-in can be done without entering comment
description:
For any document type where comment is enabled and check out is also enabled ,there check in  can easily be done without entering comment …this should not happen and a pop up must come that a comment needs to be entered … Steps to reproduce 
:Point to SqlWebAuto 
Import a document using the doc type POT EDM Checkout assume w/comment
Now in the doc retrieval ,right click and check out the comment
 Now in doc checkout list , check in the document by selecting same file but  keep comment box blank Observations:check in is happening without any pop up that you need to provide comment Expected Result:A pop up should have come that comment must be provided to check in DB : SqlWebAutoBuild version: 24.1.1.2

summary: The value of the specified currency is not automatically filled in the input field when the user selects the value from the drop-down list for the specified currency keyword in Unity Client.
description:
The value of the specified currency is not automatically filled in the input field when the user selects the value from the drop-down list for the specified currency keyword in Unity Client. (Issue found in 23.1 and 24.1)Important:
 Same functionality is working fine in WEB client and OnBase Client. so, this is considered for parity between the clients.

Actual Behavior : second listed keyword is populated.

summary: Show Comment button in Doc checked out list  doesnot work ...If it is clicked nothing is showing
description:
For any document type where comment is enabled and check out is also enabled ,there while check in no previous comments are being shown although comments can be  inputted easily . The ‘show comments’ bar can be checked/unchecked but UI has no effect .Steps to reproduce 
:Point to SqlWebAuto 
Import a document using the doc type POT EDM Checkout assume w/comment
Now in the doc retrieval ,right click and check out the comment
 Now in doc checkout list , check in the document by providing some comments 
 Now check out the doc again and go to doc checkout list
 Now select that doc and click on show comments Observations:No check-in comment is being displayed Expected Result:Previous check in comment should have been displayed DB : SqlWebAutoBuild version: 24.1.1.2

summary: MIKGs not duplicating correctly in retrieval Keyword Panel
description:
In other places(such as Import and a document’s keyword panel), the keyword panel allows duplication of MIKGs by clicking on a keyword in the MIKG, or by hitting F6 when focus is on that keyword:However in the retrieval window, keywords are instead duplicated INSIDE of the same MIKG:It seems like the first method is should be expected.




Not other versions were tested.

summary: Security Keywords added with invalid values within the Web Client Admin Panel are behaving incorrectly
description: Invalid Security Keyword values vanish when hitting save, then reappearing when adding the same keyword or another keyword to the assigned keywords list. If a user gets into this situation, the invalid keyword should not be hidden from the user.

summary: Intermittent Issue: “how instructions button collapsed S” is announced/displayed on NVDA screen viewer instead of “Show instructions button collapsed” on Custom Query Screen
description:
On Custom Query screen of web client, after selecting a custom query that has “Show Instructions” button, if TAB ot Shift+TAB is pressed to focus on that button with NVDA switched ON, it should announce the button name as “Show instructions button collapsed“. But if the TAB/Shift+TAB is pressed multiple times to change the focus out of the “Show Instructions” button and back to it, sometimes anomalies have been observed, e.g. instead of showing/announcing 
“Show instructions button collapsed”
, the speech-viewer shows and announces 
“how instructions button collapsed S”
. This phenomenon is observed intermittently, not every time though, on both laptop and VM.

summary: Version name and Version number issue for revised documents in the Web Client
description:
Issue with version name: 
User should not have the option to add a version name when a version name is already added on a revision in the web client.From the revisions/renditions settings if user goes to the Stamp Version for a revision where already a version name has been added, then user is again getting an option to add version name as shown in the picture -If user tries to apply a new version name by typing here, then the below error will come in the console -The new version name is not being updated as typed.Issue with version number:
 For any revision of an image document, if no version has been created then the Version # field shows the version as ‘0’ in the ‘Stamp Revision’ option in the web client. Whereas in Unity Client it is kept as blank as no version has been added for that revision.
